### Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New rule (category: <!-- fill in -->)

### Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` is green locally
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` is clean
- [ ] New rules include a positive fixture *and* a negative fixture test
- [ ] Fix strategies preserve user formatting where possible and are AST-based when practical
- [ ] Did not add JS execution to the plugin surface
- [ ] README / rule counts updated if applicable
